framework.name: MedCom Healthcare Messaging Security Standards
framework.scope: Security standards for healthcare messaging and integration in the Danish health sector
framework.structure_description: Standards organized by domains: message security, access control, Health Data Network, standard messages, audit and logging, and testing and certification.

controls.title: Encryption of health messages
controls.description: All electronic health messages containing patient-identifiable information must be encrypted during transmission.
controls.description_nl: Alle elektroniske sundhedsmeddelelser der indeholder patientidentificerbare oplysninger skal krypteres under transmission.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend OCES-certifikater (organisation) for punkt-til-punkt kryptering af MedCom-meddelelser.

controls.title: Digital signing of health messages
controls.description: Health messages must be digitally signed to ensure authenticity and integrity of sender and content.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedsmeddelelser skal signeres digitalt for at sikre autenticitet og integritet af afsender og indhold.

controls.title: Secure transport via VANS/eDelivery
controls.description: MedCom messages must be transmitted via approved VANS providers or eDelivery infrastructure with guaranteed delivery.
controls.description_nl: MedCom-meddelelser skal transmitteres via godkendte VANS-leverandoerer eller eDelivery-infrastruktur med garanteret levering.

controls.title: Receipt handling for messages
controls.description: Systems must implement receipt handling (positive and negative receipts) for all MedCom messages.
controls.description_nl: Systemer skal implementere kvitteringshaandtering (positive og negative kvitteringer) for alle MedCom-meddelelser.

controls.title: Authentication in health systems
controls.description: Healthcare personnel must be authenticated with secure methods (healthcare professional ID card, MitID) before accessing patient data.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedspersonale skal autentificeres med sikre metoder (sundhedsfagligt ID-kort, MitID) foer adgang til patientdata.

controls.title: Role-based access to health data
controls.description: Access to health data must be managed via role-based access control based on healthcare professional role and treatment relation.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til sundhedsdata skal styres via rollebaseret adgangskontrol baseret pa sundhedsfaglig rolle og behandlingsrelation.

controls.title: Patient consent for data sharing
controls.description: Sharing patient data across healthcare actors requires the patient informed consent unless legal authority exists.
controls.description_nl: Deling af patientdata pa tvaers af sundhedsaktorer kraever patientens informerede samtykke medmindre lovhjemmel foreligger.

controls.title: Connection requirements for Health Data Network
controls.description: Systems connecting to the Health Data Network must comply with technical and security connection requirements including network security and certificates.
controls.description_nl: Systemer der tilsluttes Sundhedsdatanettet skal overholde de tekniske og sikkerhedsmaessige tilslutningskrav inklusiv netvaerkssikkerhed og certifikater.

controls.title: VPN requirements for Health Data Network
controls.description: Connection to the Health Data Network must use encrypted VPN connection with certificate-based authentication.
controls.description_nl: Tilslutning til Sundhedsdatanettet skal ske via krypteret VPN-forbindelse med certifikatbaseret autentifikation.

controls.title: FHIR security in MedCom standards
controls.description: MedCom FHIR messages must implement OAuth 2.0 authentication and SMART on FHIR authorization for API-based data exchange.
controls.description_nl: MedCom FHIR-meddelelser skal implementere OAuth 2.0 autentifikation og SMART on FHIR autorisering for API-baseret dataudveksling.

controls.title: Validation of incoming messages
controls.description: All incoming MedCom messages must be validated against the relevant XML schema or FHIR profile before processing.
controls.description_nl: Alle indgaende MedCom-meddelelser skal valideres mod det relevante XML-skema eller FHIR-profil foer behandling.

controls.title: Error handling and retry for messages
controls.description: Systems must implement error handling with automatic retry and alerting for failed message transmissions.
controls.description_nl: Systemer skal implementere fejlhaandtering med automatisk retry og alarmering ved fejlede meddelelsestransmissioner.

controls.title: Logging of access to health data
controls.description: All access to patient data must be logged with user identity, timestamp, action, and patient identification in accordance with the Health Act.
controls.description_nl: Al adgang til patientdata skal logges med brugeridentitet, tidspunkt, handling og patientidentifikation i henhold til Sundhedsloven.

controls.title: Patient log access
controls.description: Patients must have access to see who has accessed their health data via sundhed.dk (MinLog).
controls.description_nl: Patienter skal have adgang til at se hvem der har tilgaaet deres sundhedsdata via sundhed.dk (MinLog).

controls.title: Retention of health log data
controls.description: Log data for access to health information must be retained for at least 2 years in accordance with the Health Act.
controls.description_nl: Logdata for adgang til sundhedsoplysninger skal opbevares i mindst 2 ar i henhold til Sundhedsloven.

controls.title: MedCom certification of systems
controls.description: IT systems exchanging MedCom messages must undergo MedCom testing process and obtain certification before production use.
controls.description_nl: IT-systemer der skal udveksle MedCom-meddelelser skal gennemga MedComs testproces og opna certificering foer produktionsbrug.

controls.title: Testing of message flows
controls.description: All message flows must be tested end-to-end including error scenarios and receipt handling before deployment.
controls.description_nl: Alle meddelelsesflow skal testes end-to-end inklusiv fejlscenarier og kvitteringshaandtering foer idriftsaettelse.

metadata.source: MedCom standarder for sundhedsmeddelelser og integration
